meaning: n.装货的人,装货设备,装弹机
examples: A loader is not the most efficient machine for digging as it cannot dig very deep below the level of its wheels as a backhoe can.
The coefficient of compaction is 1.22 on the mechanical loader.
The wheelchair can be released from or attached to the Abi-Loader using a simple locking mechanism.
The miners used front-loader machines that were not damaged in the collapse to clear the rubble.
